name: release-distribution-integrity-v1
description: Deterministic artifact checks for keeping public release targets aligned across workflows, npm metadata, archive handling, docs, and tests.

success.description: Adds all requested public release/distribution targets.
Handles the known Linux musl PyInstaller/binutils build hazard.
Keeps npm runtime metadata/resolution aligned with libc-specific targets.

partial.description: Expands much of the matrix but may miss the musl hazard or npm libc alignment.
